content.en:
The fifteenth floor of the True Sacred Tower.

Ye Tian faced the Origin Realm Legendary Lord of this layer, and he had to use the Legendary Eternal Technique, otherwise there would be no system to break through this layer at all.

When Ye Tian displayed the Legendary Eternal Technique, he easily defeated the opponent of the fifteenth layer.

The sixteenth floor!

Seventeenth floor!

Eighteenth floor!

......

The strength of the opponent at each level was not increased too much, but at the nineteenth layer, even if Ye Tian performed the Legendary Eternal Technique, he had to go all out to defeat the opponent.

Ye Tian estimated that he couldn't break through a few more layers, maybe the twentieth layer was his limit.

Finally, Ye Tian came to the twentieth layer.

The opponents at this level are very powerful, and the three opponents are all able to perform Legendary-level Eternal Techniques, and Ye Tian can use a variety of Legendary-level Eternal Techniques such as Void Step, Hundred Million Void, Will Wall Light, and Void True Body, which is enough to compete with them.

Thundered!!!!

The entire twentieth layer seemed to have turned into a place of annihilation, and the fight between the two sides tore apart all the rules here, but even so, there was no way to cause damage to the True Saintless Tower, no matter how much the internal void was destroyed, it would slowly recover later

After fighting for a long time, Ye Tian began to get injured, but at this time, he cast the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives.

This Eternal Path was enlightened by him 110 from the Eternal Supreme Treasure Blue Leaf, although he could not use the Jialan Leaf, but there was no problem in using the Eternal Path.

Under the effect of the Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives, the injuries of his body recovered extremely quickly, but the injuries of the three Origin Realm Legendary Lords had no way to recover, after all, they were just Legendary Lords condensed from the True Saintless Tower, and it would be unfair if they could recover their injuries.

In this way, Ye Tian won by force.

Twenty-first place.

Ye Tian entered this layer, but found that he was not an opponent, so he immediately chose to quit the True Saint Tower, because if he couldn't fight, he couldn't fight, and it was just a waste of time to continue fighting.

When Ye Tian walked out of the True Saintless Pagoda, he immediately ushered in the gaze of many Eternal Realms.

At this moment, all the Eternal Realms looked at Ye Tian in disbelief.

"What is the origin of this guy, he actually broke through the twentieth floor of the True Saintless Pagoda!!"

The Silver Moon Lord was a little incredulous.

If someone had told her before that someone could break through the twentieth layer of the True Saintless Tower, he would never believe it, unless it was those Legendary Realm Lords who could hope to do so, but the Legendary Realm Lords would not come to the True Saintless Pagoda to break through.

The True Saintless Tower is just a sub-building for the entry screening, and the powerhouses of the True Saintless Land will not come here to test.

Therefore, only those who want to join the Eternal Realm of the True Saintless Pagoda will come to the test, so how many of these Eternal Realms who want to join the Eternal Realm of the Truly Innocent Pagoda are terrifying?

Not a single one!

But now, a demon like Ye Tian actually came to participate.

Rumble!!!!

A figure appeared above the True Saintless Pagoda. This is a woman, her whole body is cold, and many eternal realms just glanced at it, as if her will has been frozen.

"I've seen the Frostless Lord!"

Many Eternal Realms said respectfully.

The Lord of the Five Frosts is one of the high-ranking members of the True Immortal Holy Land, and he is a half-step Legendary Lord Xuan, and even among the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lords, he is extremely powerful.

Under normal circumstances, such a half-step Legendary Realm Lord would not have come here, but now he came, obviously for Ye Tian.

"Two of them have passed our entrance exam, come with me!"

The Frostless Lord waved his hand.

The Silver Moon Lord and Ye Tian were pulled to him one after another, and Ye Tian did not resist.

After approaching the Frostless Lord, the Frostless Lord took Ye Tian and the Silver Moon Lord and began to go to the True Holy Land of the True Frostless Holy Land.

In fact, this is only the territory of the True Unholy Land, but it is not the power of the True Unholy Land.

The true location of the True Nothing Holy Land is located on the True Nothing Island, which is also the largest eternal immeasurable island in the True Nothing Islands

In the blink of an eye, they had passed through a barrier and entered the True Void Land.

Soon, Ye Tian followed the Frostless Lord to an ancient temple in the True Frostless Holy Land.

Here, Ye Tian met a number of Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords and several half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

As for the Legendary Realm Lord, Ye Tian didn't see a single one, this kind of existence is too mysterious, and it can't be seen when you meet.

Then.

The Frostless Lord spoke: "Silver Moon Lord, you have broken through the ninth layer of the True Saintless Tower, as for your origin, we have already verified it, from today onwards, you are a member of the Human-level Saint-level of the True Void Holy Land, and you can choose any position that a member of the Human-level Saint-level can choose, you can choose a billion."

"Yes!"

The Silver Moon Lord replied.

According to her own understanding, with her own strength and potential, she can only obtain a number of members of the rank saint sub-level, of course, she can continue to improve in the future, but she needs a certain opportunity, and she has just joined the True No Holy Land, so she will definitely not be able to level up quickly.

"What level of membership will the Endless Lord receive?" the Silvermoon Lord was curious.

However, the Frostless Lord did not immediately announce Ye Tian's membership treatment, but asked: "Endless Lord, we only know that you are from outside the Infinite Sea, but the True Nothing Holy Land has no way to detect the situation outside the True Nothing Holy Land. If you feel that your privacy has been offended, you can refuse, but you can only become an ordinary disciple of the True Void Holy Land, or you can choose to leave the True Void Holy Land. "

Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, and said directly, "I'm from the Source Sea, an eternal sea that has not been detected by the Infinite Sea, and it is not too far away from the Infinite Sea, I can tell the space-time coordinates of the True Innocent Holy Land, and the True-Void Holy Land will build a space-time ladder to go to the Source Sea to find out the situation." "

New Eternal Sea !!!

The Frostless Lord and the other high-ranking people of the True Immortal Land were all amazed, such an eternal sea was not of great value!

If it spreads, I am afraid that many top forces want to occupy it and develop it into their own back garden.

Of course, the True Unholy Land doesn't care about an Eternal Sea, because it doesn't help the True Unholy Land much.

"Okay, let's build the Ladder of Time and Space."

The Frostless Lord agreed.

Subsequently, after Ye Tian reported the space-time coordinates, the Frostless Lord could build the space-time ladder.

Soon, the Space-Time Staircase was built and connected to the Source Sea.

-

Genhai, somewhere.

The Frostless Lord walked out of the space-time ladder and sensed the Source Sea.

"It's really an unknown eternal sea, and it's still relatively young!"

The Frostless Lord muttered.

Wow!

The void rippled in the distance, and a copy of Ye Tian's body walked over, saw the Frostless Lord, and said respectfully: "I've seen the Frostless Lord!"

When the Frostless Lord saw Ye Tian's replica body, he knew that this was Ye Tian's clone or body, so he roughly knew some things.

However, the Frostless Lord still took a little time to explore the Source Sea, as well as the memories of some of the creatures in the Source Sea, and learned about the situation here.

As long as it is proved that Ye Tian does not belong to a certain legendary-level force, then there will be no problem.

And there are only a few Legendary Realm Lords in the Source Sea, so naturally there is no legendary-level power.

Thereupon.

"Endless Lord, after certification, you are fully qualified to join the True Immortal Holy Land and receive the treatment of a Heavenly Rank Saint Son!" the Frostless Lord announced.

"What, Heavenly Rank Saint Son !!"

As soon as the Silver Moon Lord heard such treatment, he was immediately shocked.

As soon as he joined the True No Holy Land, he became the highest-level Holy Son, which was a great treatment.

But when she thought of Ye Tian's strength, she felt normal again. _
